changelog: Architecture: Solved DRY violation. SudokuEngine shared dynamically via Isomorphic pattern without new files.
Performance: Fixed battery drain bug - LocalStorage now saves selectively (on action/visibility change) instead of interval.
Feature: Hardware Back Button integration (Android/Mobile) - smart navigation logic
Feature: Added 'Keep Screen Awake' toggle in Settings (Screen Wake Lock API)
OFFLINE PERFECT: Complete offline functionality guaranteed
Service Worker: Enhanced caching with all critical assets
Service Worker: Robust fetch fallback prevents hanging
